text:
Market today: Mixed signals everywhere — bulls and bears are deadlocked per the volatility indicators. No clear catalyst either way, but a rising dollar is quietly headwind for big multinationals like AVGO and PLTR that earn globally.

Your holdings: Three need eyes. PLTR is down 17.56% and already flagged SELL — on margin, that hole gets expensive fast, stop at $85 but you're well above it still, so the question is why you're still holding. AVGO is your largest position, down 13.18% and flagged TRIM — a rising dollar plus any earnings disappointment could accelerate the slide; trim before it forces your hand. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with almost no trading history — headline today confirms wild swings tied to Elon sentiment, and margin amplifies every dip here.

Watch: (1) How AVGO reacts to any dollar strength news — it's your biggest exposure. (2) SPCX/SPAL volatility around SpaceX headlines; SPAL is 2x leveraged and decays daily.

Bottom line: Your two biggest risks are sitting in your two biggest losers — act on PLTR and AVGO before the market acts for you.
